items.headline: Suspension of Trading
items.summary: Members of the Exchange are hereby informed that the trading in the partly paid-up equity shares (Series: E1, ISIN: IN9624Z01022) of Solara Active Pharma Sciences Limited shall be suspended w.e.f. April 02, 2026 (i.e., closing hours of trading on April 01, 2026) on account of second & final call.
